properties.name: Kaiserpfalz Franconofurd
properties.description: The historic origin of Frankfurt. Built as a royal palace, serving as a seat of power for Charlemagne's successors.

properties.name: Frankfurter Dom (St. Bartholomew's)
properties.description: The dominant Gothic collegiate church of Frankfurt, serving as the official election and coronation site of Holy Roman Emperors.

properties.name: Saalburg Roman Fort
properties.description: A cohort fort on the Limes Germanicus, serving as a key military outpost along the outer border of the Roman Empire.

properties.name: Burg Kronberg
properties.description: An imposing hilltop fortress nestled in the Taunus mountains, built by the noble Knights of Kronberg.

properties.name: Staufenmauer (City Wall)
properties.description: The first stone boundary wall erected around Frankfurt to defend the free imperial city during the Staufen dynasty.
